tweets.title:
Daily US-Israel-Iran War Brief: 
3rd May 2026  

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East 
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief.
  
● Israel has approved its fourth F-35I “Adir” squadron, expanding the IAF fleet toward ~100 advanced stealth fighters from the current 2 operational squadrons at Nevatim.

● OPEC+ members Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, and Oman agreed to a production adjustment of 188,000 barrels/day from their voluntary cuts, effective June 2026.

● CENTCOM notes that of today, 49 commercial vessels have been redirected to comply with blockade.

● An Israeli court in Ashkelon has extended the detention of two flotilla activists by two days following their interception by the navy.

● Iran’s 14-point proposal clashes with US demands, as Tehran wants to delay nuclear talks while Washington insists Iran first give up its 400 kg+ of highly enriched uranium. Iran instead prioritizes reopening the Strait of Hormuz before nuclear negotiations.

A dramatic overnight rescue unfolded in Uttar Pradesh’s Gorakhpur district as two children were left stranded atop a water tank after the access ladder was damaged. Responding swiftly to the state administration’s request, the Indian Air Force deployed its Mi-17 V5 helicopter under Central Air Command.
